sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: USA Today ranks Carrier a climate leader for cutting emissions intensity
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) has been recognized by USA Today as one of America's Climate Leaders for the third consecutive year. The ranking, developed with Statista, assesses U.S.-headquartered companies on their reductions in emissions intensity relative to revenue. Carrier's sustained progress in reducing greenhouse gas emissions and improving operational efficiency across its solutions led to this recognition.

feed.title: MGM Resorts completes sale of MGM Northfield Park operations
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has finalized the sale of its MGM Northfield Park operations in Ohio to private equity funds managed by Clairvest Group for $546 million in cash, with expected net proceeds of $420 million after taxes. The sale is part of MGM's strategy to divest non-strategic regional assets at a higher multiple, enabling them to maintain a strong balance sheet, invest in growth, and return capital to shareholders. The master lease agreement with VICI Properties has been adjusted, reducing MGM's annual rent by $53 million.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Plans Power Shutoffs Impacting Thousands Amid Elevated Fire Danger
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is implementing Public Safety Power Shutoffs across western and southern Colorado due to high wildfire risks, affecting approximately 14,000 customers, especially in the San Luis Valley. These precautionary shutoffs are in response to strong winds, dry vegetation, and low humidity, which increase the potential for electrical equipment to spark wildfires. Customers are advised to prepare for outages and stay informed as conditions evolve.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams declares $0.80 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders recorded by May 22, 2026. The paint giant boasts 33 consecutive years of dividend increases and an annual yield of 0.96%. While InvestingPro suggests the stock is currently overvalued, analysts have offered varied price targets ranging from $355 to $420.

feed.title: FedEx cuts more than 100 jobs at two facilities
feed.summary: FedEx has cut 106 jobs across two facilities in New York and Pennsylvania. One of these job reductions is connected to the company's Network 2.0 initiative, as reported by the Memphis Business Journal.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.80 a Share, Payable June 5 to Shareholders of Record as of May 22
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.80 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 22, 2026. This announcement comes amidst recent analyst rating adjustments and price target changes for the company.

feed.title: Twilio upgraded by Bank of America on AI-driven growth outlook
feed.summary: Bank of America has upgraded Twilio Inc. (NYSE:TWLO) to 'Buy' from 'Underperform', increasing its price objective to $190 from $110. This upgrade is based on improving fundamentals and a strong growth outlook driven by AI, with Twilio being seen as a crucial infrastructure layer for emerging AI applications, especially in voice and messaging. The bank anticipates accelerating gross profit growth and expanding free cash flow margins, further supported by upcoming quarterly earnings and the annual Signal customer event.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (GSCE) issues callable 3‑underlier notes; capped $1,236 call payment
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Finance Corp. is offering structured, non-interest bearing callable notes linked to the Russell 2000® Index, EURO STOXX 50® Index, and iShares® MSCI Emerging Markets ETF, maturing on April 25, 2029. These notes feature an automatic call option on April 20, 2027, paying $1,236 per $1,000 face amount if all underliers are at or above their initial levels. If not called, the maturity payout is determined by the lesser performing underlier, offering 300% upside participation for positive returns but significant principal loss potential if the lesser performing underlier falls below 80% of its initial level.

feed.title: [S-3] CINCINNATI FINANCIAL CORP Shelf Registration Statement
feed.summary: Cincinnati Financial Corporation has filed an S-3 Shelf Registration Statement for 500,000 shares of common stock under its Shareholder Investment Plan. This plan allows new and existing investors to purchase shares directly and reinvest dividends, with minimum reinvestment requirements and optional cash investments. The prospectus details enrollment, purchase mechanics, fees, shareholder rights, and tax considerations, highlighting the company's insurance business and potential risks associated with stock investment.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Sells Northfield Park Venue for $546M
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has sold its operations at MGM Northfield Park for $546 million to Clairvest Group Inc., as part of MGM's strategy to focus on higher-growth assets like destinations and digital offerings. Despite the venue's profitability and popularity, MGM CEO Bill Hornbuckle stated it no longer fits their core vision. Clairvest, a company known for investing in regional casinos, gains a stable and profitable venue, with net proceeds for MGM estimated at $420 million after taxes and expenses.

feed.title: Proxy advisor ISS urges ConocoPhillips shareholders to vote for independent board chair
feed.summary: Proxy advisor Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has recommended that ConocoPhillips shareholders vote for a proposal advocating an independent board chair, citing the need for stronger oversight of management. The non-binding proposal seeks to separate the roles of chair and CEO, with an independent director at the helm of the board, to provide more robust independent oversight and address concerns about the current lead director role and ConocoPhillips' underperformance relative to the S&P 500. ConocoPhillips' board, which currently has Ryan Lance serving as both chairman and CEO, has recommended against the proposal, stating that the combined role with an independent lead director is in shareholders' best interests.

feed.title: Templeton Emerging Markets Fund Announces $0.0475 Monthly Distribution Plan for 2025
feed.summary: Templeton Emerging Markets Income Fund (NYSE: TEI) has announced a monthly distribution of $0.0475 per share for 2025, payable on January 31, 2025, to shareholders of record on January 21, 2025. This managed distribution plan aims to provide consistent monthly payouts and potentially narrow the discount between the fund's market price and its net asset value. The fund intends to generate these distributions primarily from net investment income, but may use long-term capital gains or return of capital if necessary.

feed.title: Viking Holdings Ltd Cash Flow – GETTEX:ZG8
feed.summary: This article provides key cash flow data for Viking Holdings Ltd (ZG8) as of Q4 2025. It highlights a free cash flow of 574.16 million EUR for Q4 2025, with an annual free cash flow of 1.11 billion EUR and operating cash flow of 1.98 billion EUR for the same year. The information is presented through various financial statements focusing on operating, investing, and financing activities.

feed.title: Textron To Expand European Parts and Distribution Center in Düsseldorf
feed.summary: Textron Aviation is set to expand its European parts and distribution center in Düsseldorf. This expansion will add 1,000 square meters of space and increase the parts inventory by 5,000 items to enhance fulfillment services for its customers. The move aims to improve support and efficiency for Textron Aviation operations in Europe.

feed.title: Elong Power (ELPW) surges as low-float trading ramps up after recent filings and listing actions
feed.summary: Elong Power (ELPW) saw a significant surge of 56.9% in its stock price, attributed to technical and speculative momentum in a low-float stock. This movement follows recent corporate actions including a 1-for-80 share consolidation, the filing of its annual report, and a transfer of its listing to the Nasdaq Capital Market. Hedge fund activity shows a mix of decreases and additions to ELPW holdings from Q4 2025 to Q1 2026.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams declares $0.80 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 22, 2026. This marks the 33rd consecutive year the paint and coatings giant has raised its dividend. Several analysts have updated their price targets for Sherwin-Williams, with RBC Capital, UBS, and Morgan Stanley maintaining positive ratings, while Argus lowered its price target but still holds a Buy rating.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) slides as mortgage-score pricing comes under renewed scrutiny
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stock dropped 6.7% due to renewed investor concerns about political and industry pressure on its mortgage-credit-score pricing, potentially curbing future pricing power and increasing competitive adoption of alternative models. A U.S. Senate oversight letter highlighted a planned price increase for FICO's mortgage-related per-score price in 2026, raising regulatory and policy response risks. Despite solid recent results and reiterated full-year guidance, the market is re-rating the stock due to these pressures.

feed.title: How is eBay Essential to the Circular Economy and Advancing Environmental Stewardship?
feed.summary: eBay plays a crucial role in advancing the circular economy and environmental stewardship through its recommerce platform, which encourages reusing and reselling products. In 2025, eBay's platform generated $5.3 billion in positive economic impact while avoiding 1.6 million metric tons of carbon emissions and diverting 71,000 metric tons of waste. The company also supports circularity through its Circular Fashion Fund and has a Climate Transition Plan aiming for net-zero emissions by 2045.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Cutting 206 More Jobs
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb announced an additional 206 job cuts between July and December 2026 as part of an ongoing cost-cutting strategy aiming for $2 billion in savings by 2027. These layoffs contribute to more than 1,700 positions eliminated since January 2025, driven by efforts to streamline operations and enhance efficiency. The company seeks to become a "leaner, more efficient company" while investing in growth brands and promising scientific areas.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams declares quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share payable June 5, 2026
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, which will be payable on June 5, 2026. This announcement comes amid recent analyst rating adjustments and price target changes for the company. The article also provides a company profile, financial data, and analyst consensus information.

feed.title: West Virginia's first combined-cycle gas plant targets power for 1.5M
feed.summary: Kindle Energy has broken ground on Wolf Summit Energy, a 600-megawatt combined-cycle natural gas power generation facility in West Virginia, backed by Blackstone. This plant, the first of its kind in the state, is designed to provide reliable power to 1.5 million residents across Virginia, Maryland, and Delaware served by ODEC, and is expected to create 500 construction jobs. The project emphasizes efficient and reliable baseload power to meet growing energy demands and enhance grid stability.

feed.title: Proxy advisor ISS urges ConocoPhillips shareholders to vote for independent board chair
feed.summary: ISS, a prominent proxy advisor, is recommending that ConocoPhillips shareholders vote in favor of appointing an independent chair to the company's board. The recommendation aims to enhance corporate governance at the oil giant. This move could influence the outcome of upcoming shareholder votes at ConocoPhillips.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Stock Drops After U.S. Agencies Announce Alternative Credit Scores Can Be Used in Mortgage Decisions
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stock dropped after U.S. government mortgage agencies announced that alternative credit scores can now be used for loan applications. This decision could expand access to the housing market for more Americans and challenges FICO's long-standing dominance in the mortgage credit scoring industry.

feed.title: $0.80 a share: Sherwin-Williams sets June 5 dividend payout
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share. This dividend is payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 22, 2026. The Board of Directors approved this dividend on April 22, 2026.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Declares Dividend of $0.80 per Common Share
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share. This dividend is payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 22, 2026. The announcement was made on April 22, 2026, from Cleveland, Ohio.

feed.title: Netflix Stock Has Lost Steam. This Next Step Could Heat Things Up Again.
feed.summary: Netflix's stock has declined 3% in April, but a J.P. Morgan analyst believes the company's new strategy of launching vertical videos is a solid plan. This move is aimed at competing with social media companies for user engagement, potentially re-energizing the stock.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Ulta Beauty (ULTA) After A 51% One Year Rally?
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) has seen a 51% rally over the past year, leading to questions about its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued by 13.6% at its current price of US$570, with a fair value estimated at $501.76 per share. The company's P/E ratio of 21.6x is above the industry average but below a peer group, and a proprietary "Fair Ratio" indicates it's trading above its model-driven range.

feed.title: Philip Morris rallies and lifts tobacco peers on IQOS strength, consumer resiliency (PM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PM) saw a 6.9% increase in its stock price following its Q1 earnings report, which also positively impacted other tobacco companies. The rally was primarily driven by the strong performance of its IQOS product and consumer resilience.

feed.title: Supreme Court sides with Michigan in Enbridge pipeline case
feed.summary: The Supreme Court has ruled in favor of Michigan in a case concerning Enbridge Inc.'s Line 5 oil pipeline. The pipeline runs under the Straits of Mackinac. This decision is significant for the state's efforts related to the pipeline.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corp Stock (LMT) Moved Down by 3.17% on Apr 22: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin Corp (LMT) experienced a 3.17% stock price decline, primarily due to investor concerns ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report and the postponement of a multi-billion dollar F-16 acquisition by Peru. Analysts have lowered EPS and revenue estimates, further impacting investor confidence. Technical indicators show a sell signal, with an oversold condition suggesting close monitoring is needed.

feed.title: Welltower Inc Stock (WELL) Moved Down by 3.18% on Apr 22: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Welltower Inc (WELL) stock declined by 3.18% due to a critical report from Land & Buildings Investment Management concerning its executive program and a peer REIT missing its IPO target. Despite generally positive market conditions and analyst "Moderate Buy" ratings, these concerns outweighed other indicators. The company faces scrutiny over potential negative impacts on shareholder returns, high valuation, and anticipated pressure on Q1 2026 financial results from higher interest expenses.

feed.title: Biogen upgraded by UBS on ‘slew of pipeline catalysts’ going into 2027
feed.summary: UBS analysts have upgraded Biogen to 'Buy' from 'Neutral' and raised its price target to $225 from $185, citing increasing confidence in several clinical and commercial catalysts expected through 2027. The upgrade is driven by an anticipated period of pipeline readouts, including key late-stage programs in neurology, immunology, and rare diseases. Shares of Biogen were trading at approximately $190 on Wednesday afternoon.

feed.title: SLB Ties Physics Native AI And Subsea Boosting To Growth Story
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) is enhancing its growth strategy by implementing a physics-native AI platform for upstream production optimization in Bahrain and supplying advanced subsea boosting systems for a major Gulf of Mexico development. These projects highlight the company's shift towards digital energy management and specialized subsea engineering, moving beyond conventional contract wins. While these initiatives present higher-value service opportunities, they also introduce execution risks associated with complex, large-scale projects.

feed.title: Does J. M. Smucker (SJM) Offer Value After A 15% One-Year Share Price Decline?
feed.summary: J. M. Smucker (SJM) has seen a 15.4% decline in its share price over the last year. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 68.7% undervalued with an intrinsic value of $305.56 per share compared to its current US$95.74, its Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratio of 1.14x is currently in line with Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio, suggesting it's "about right" based on that metric. The article encourages investors to consider different valuation narratives and fundamental data when assessing the company.

feed.title: Assessing Whether Sempra (SRE) Still Looks Undervalued After Recent Share Price Moves
feed.summary: Sempra (SRE) has seen recent share price fluctuations, with a slight daily decline but gains over the past month and three months. Despite a recent pullback, the stock has shown strong longer-term momentum with a 1-year return of 32.75%. The article explores whether Sempra, currently trading at $93.15 against a published target of $104.47, is still undervalued, considering its P/E ratio is higher than industry averages.

feed.title: Synopsys (SNPS) Is Up 11.6% After New NASA Artemis Simulation Role Strengthens Ansys Integration Story
feed.summary: Synopsys (SNPS) saw an 11.6% increase in its stock price following NASA's selection of the company for its Artemis lunar mission. Synopsys will use advanced Ansys simulation tools and its digital mission engineering platform for spacesuit compatibility and lunar communications, reinforcing its shift from pure EDA to a broader silicon-to-systems simulation platform. This collaboration highlights the application of Synopsys' chip-to-systems simulation capabilities in critical aerospace applications, demonstrating real-world examples of its expanded systems narrative beyond just chips.

feed.title: Top 4 Energy Stocks to Watch in 2026: Exxon (XOM), ConocoPhillips (COP), Chevron (CVX), and Cheniere (LNG)
feed.summary: This article examines four major energy stocks—Exxon Mobil (XOM), ConocoPhillips (COP), Cheniere Energy (LNG), and Chevron (CVX)—highlighting their financial performance in 2025 and strategic plans for 2026. It discusses their diversified business models, capital expenditures, growth initiatives, and current Wall Street analyst ratings. The analysis aims to inform investors seeking long-term exposure to the energy sector, noting Cheniere and ConocoPhillips have the strongest analyst support.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider EPR Properties (EPR) After Its Recent Share Price Run?
feed.summary: EPR Properties has seen significant share price appreciation over various periods, including 22.1% over the last year. Despite this run, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued by 54.8%, with an intrinsic value of about $125.00 per share compared to its recent price of $56.56. Additionally, its P/E ratio of 17.25x is below its proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 31.86x, further indicating a potential discount on an earnings basis.

feed.title: Microsoft to test third-party AI models for incorporation in its security offerings
feed.summary: Microsoft is set to evaluate third-party AI models to integrate into its cybersecurity platforms, aiming to enhance its defenses against AI-driven threats. This initiative follows the debut of Anthropic's Mythos model, which Microsoft will test for vulnerability discovery. The company plans to use these models for continuous network vulnerability scans, attack exposure reduction, and developing new AI-powered security solutions for customers.

feed.title: Emcor, Ampco-Pittsburgh are among industrials hitting 52-week highs (EME:NYSE)
feed.summary: A number of industrial and cyclical stocks, including Emcor Group Inc. and Ampco-Pittsburgh Corp., reached new 52-week highs, suggesting a market rotation towards companies involved in infrastructure upgrades, power demand, specialized equipment, and corporate turnarounds. This trend is driven by factors such as power grid modernization, increasing maintenance needs for aging infrastructure, and growth in AI hardware. These companies are benefiting from increased demand for their services and specialized products.

feed.title: Equity LifeStyle Properties: Strong Q1 results, stable guidance, and resilient demand drive continued growth outlook
feed.summary: Equity LifeStyle Properties reported strong Q1 2026 results with normalized FFO of $0.84 per share and a 4.9% year-over-year NOI growth. The company maintained its full-year guidance, supported by high occupancy in its manufactured homes and RV segments, a robust balance sheet, and favorable demographic trends. This indicates a positive outlook for continued growth.

feed.title: Evotec : Current Company Presentation 1.101 MB (2026 04 EVT Company Presentation)
feed.summary: Evotec SE released its current company presentation highlighting its strategy, operational excellence, and financial outlook. Key points include leveraging technological leadership in drug discovery, monetizing Just - Evotec Biologics assets, and the potential for significant returns from its asset pipeline. The company also announced the sale of its Toulouse J.POD manufacturing site to Sandoz, a move aimed at accelerating its asset-lighter business model and improving financial returns.

feed.title: US054561AJ49 Latest News and Headlines
feed.summary: This article provides the latest news and headlines for Equitable Holdings, Inc. 4.35% 20-APR-2028 bond, identified by US054561AJ49, traded on the Stuttgart Stock Exchange. It indicates that the market is currently closed and briefly lists information providers for selected market and reference data.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001193125-26-169452
feed.summary: This SEC filing details a Form 485BPOS post-effective amendment for Equitable Financial Life Insurance Co (RILA), submitted on April 22, 2026. The filing includes numerous exhibits such as data pages, guaranteed annuity payment tables, legal opinions, and powers of attorney. It also provides company identification details and links to various graphic and XBRL data files.

feed.title: Welltower Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
feed.summary: Welltower (WELL) is set to report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 28, with expectations of year-over-year growth in revenues and normalized FFO per share, driven by its senior housing operating portfolio and strategic investments. Despite anticipated strong performance, high interest expenses may present a challenge. The company has a Zacks Rank of 2 and an Earnings ESP of 0.00%, suggesting the possibility of an FFO beat is not conclusively predicted by their model.

feed.title: Q1 2026 W R Berkley Corp Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corp (WRB) reported a strong Q1 2026 with a net income of $515 million and record operating income of $514 million, driven by increased net investment income. The company also reduced its effective tax rate and repurchased $302 million in common shares. However, it faced challenges including a slight increase in the insurance segment's cost ratio, decreased net premiums written in reinsurance, and impacts from significant winter storm activity.

feed.title: AT&T Reports 2.9% Revenue Growth And Q1 Earnings Beat Expectations
feed.summary: AT&T reported first-quarter revenue growth of 2.9% to $31.5 billion, exceeding expectations, with adjusted earnings of 57 cents per share also beating estimates. The company's strategy of bundling wireless and broadband services is showing success, evidenced by strong subscriber additions in mobile and residential internet. AT&T is repositioning its business by separating legacy copper operations and expanding its fiber footprint, despite ongoing competition.

feed.title: Amazon Expands Rufus AI As 300 Million Users Show 60% Higher Purchase Rates
feed.summary: Amazon is enhancing its AI shopping assistant, Rufus, despite initial inconsistencies in recommendations. The company aims to integrate AI into product discovery and purchasing, leveraging its vast data. CEO Andy Jassy noted that 300 million users in 2025 who used Rufus had a 60% higher purchase completion rate.

feed.title: Parkland School Board members concerned a tax break for Eli Lilly would shortchange the district
feed.summary: Parkland School Board members have expressed strong concerns over a proposed 10-year tax break for Eli Lilly's new manufacturing plant, fearing it would lead to a significant financial loss for the district. While economic development agencies tout the long-term benefits and job creation, board members are focused on the immediate impact of forgone tax revenue amidst existing budget deficits and increasing enrollment. They are seeking more concrete commitments from Eli Lilly regarding partnerships and direct benefits to the school district to offset the potential financial sacrifices.

feed.title: Devon Energy vs. EOG: Which Shale Stock Offers More Upside in 2026?
feed.summary: This article compares Devon Energy (DVN) and EOG Resources (EOG), two major U.S. shale producers, to determine which offers a better investment opportunity for 2026. The analysis covers earnings growth projections, Return on Equity, Debt to Capital, valuation, capital expenditure plans, and price performance. Based on several metrics, Devon Energy appears to have an edge over EOG Resources.
